summary: Brutal Friday selloff: Nasdaq -4.2%, silver -7.5%, BTC -18% weekly. Hot May NFP (172K vs 85K) killed rate-cut narrative. Markets now pricing possible rate HIKE. CPI Tuesday Jun 10 is make-or-break for everything. OPEC+ meets Saturday — could gap oil Monday. All our assets in trending-down regime. System holding XAG remnant (26.92oz) with 7.50 hard stop, 0.57% buffer. Bold portfolio DORMANT.

XAG-USD.note: Only 0.57% above hard stop. If 7.50 breached, exit 26.92oz remnant. CPI cool = snap-back to 2+. CPI hot = test 5.

XAU-USD.note: No position. Lowest of 2026. SELL signals dominate.

BTC-USD.note: F&G=12 extreme fear. MVRV 1.2 in accumulation band. ETF outflows 13 straight days. Watch for flow reversal as bottom signal.

ETH-USD.note: Follows BTC. No independent catalyst. Trending-down.

MSTR.note: First-ever BTC sale. Correlated with BTC. If BTC <8K, MSTR tests 00.

trade_ideas.rationale: RSI 26-29 extreme oversold. Stop 7.50 intact. Silver prophecy 20 intact. June is seasonally weak for silver. CPI Tuesday is the catalyst — cool CPI = violent snap-back.

MVRV 1.2 in accumulation band (7/7 positive 12M returns historically). aSOPR 0.97-0.99 = capitulation. Exchange reserves 7-year low. BUT: no entry until ETF outflow streak breaks AND price sustains >5K.
trade_ideas.timeframe: Wait for CPI catalyst + ETF flow reversal

system_improvements_proposed: P0: Manual 1d HORIZON_SIGNAL_WEIGHTS updated — drift_regime_gate collapsed from 1.4 to 0.5, bb from 1.3 to 0.5
P1: crypto_evrp showing 99.1% recent but has history of small-sample illusion. NOT enabling — monitoring.
P2: Directional accuracy weighting already implemented (BUG-182 fix). Gate at 44% threshold.
P3: 30+ shadow signals with 0 outcome samples — need outcome_tracker.py investigation.
P4: Per-ticker consensus tracking shows 0 samples — data pipeline appears broken.
P5: IC-based weighting (P1 from quant research) — already partially implemented. Full walk-forward IC is 5-day effort.
risk_warnings: XAG hard stop 7.50 — only 0.57% buffer. Weekend gap risk if OPEC+ surprises.
CPI Tuesday Jun 10 — hot print extends selloff across ALL assets. Cool print = violent relief rally.
Layer 2 had 7 consecutive failures (exit code 1) early Friday — auth detection issue persists.
BTC at 1K with thin weekend liquidity — could flash-crash to 8K before Monday equity markets open.
OPEC+ Saturday meeting — oil could gap either direction Monday. Indirect metals impact.
Multiple signal weights have drifted significantly from their tuned values (drift_regime_gate, bb, crypto_macro).
research_highlights: Silver seasonality: June historically weak. January/October strongest months. Current drop is seasonally consistent.
Gold-Silver ratio at ~60 near fair value — less MR alpha available than when it was 88-105.
BTC on-chain: MVRV 1.2 in accumulation band. 7/7 positive 12M forward returns at this level since 2013.
Signal engine BUY/SELL asymmetry: aggregate BUY accuracy 53.1% vs SELL 54.1%. Individual signals have 20-49% directional gaps.
Disabled gems: crypto_evrp 99.1% recent (but oscillation history), shannon_entropy 79.5% recent, intraday_seasonality 74.1% recent.
Dynamic horizon weight computation is working — manual weights are fallback only. Stale manual weights less impactful than feared.
IC-based signal weighting and regime-conditioned signal selection identified as highest-impact structural improvements.
